heroSection.title: EyeDetect Lie Detection in Lviv, Ukraine & across Europe
heroSection.text:
✓ Official Converus partner in Ukraine

✓ Trusted by U.S. and European law enforcement

✓ Captures 50+ involuntary eye reactions per second

✓ 15–45 minute test with automated, tamper-proof results

homeAboutSection.title: The EyeDetect Technology and the Expert Behind It
homeAboutSection.subTitle: EyeDetect was developed by Converus (USA). It analyses involuntary micro-movements of the eyes — unlike a classic polygraph, there are no body sensors, no pressure on the examinee and no subjective scoring. Results are produced by an unbiased AI algorithm. Testing in Lviv is conducted by Nataliia Marynyak — psychologist and certified specialist in oculomotor deception detection.
homeAboutSection.listIntro: An expert approach that delivers results:
homeAboutSection.imgCaption: Russ Warner, Chief Commercial Officer at Converus (USA), and Nataliia Marynyak — certified EyeDetect expert in Ukraine

homeAdvantagesSection.title: Why companies choose EyeDetect
homeAdvantagesSection.subTitle: EyeDetect is a next-generation polygraph that records involuntary micro-movements of the eyes. Unlike a traditional lie detector, the test is taken on a computer with no body sensors, and the result is produced by an unbiased algorithm. Automated scoring keeps our pricing for polygraph services in Lviv transparent for both corporate clients and private individuals.

homeClientsSection.title: EyeDetect: 1,000+ clients and 500,000+ tests across 60 countries

homeDirectionsSection.title: When EyeDetect helps
homeDirectionsSection.subTitle: EyeDetect in Lviv is used when you need to quickly verify the truthfulness of statements, narrow down possible scenarios and make decisions based on a structured assessment. It is not a substitute for an investigation or court proceedings, but an effective tool for corporate and private clients when it is critical to understand whether a person is concealing material information.
homeDirectionsSection.conclusion: EyeDetect works best when questions are framed specifically: not “is this a good person?”, but “did you share this information?”, “did you take the money?”, “were you involved in the theft?”, “did you conceal material facts?”. This level of specificity makes the assessment valid and the result actionable.

homeCountriesSection.title: Trusted in 60+ countries worldwide
homeCountriesSection.subTitle: EyeDetect is chosen by U.S. police departments, banks, universities and international corporations

homeConditionsSection.title: Comfortable testing conditions for the EyeDetect polygraph (lie detector)

homeOrderSection.title: Contact us
homeOrderSection.question: To book an EyeDetect polygraph (lie detector) test, leave your details in the form or reach out via the contacts below.
homeOrderSection.answer: Certified polygraph examiner and psychologist Nataliia Marynyak will get back to you shortly.
